channel.title: Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:October 15
channel.description: Audio Orthodox Christian Sermons: Feasts of the Saints:October 15

item.title: Feasts of the Saints, 2014-10-28
item.description: :Feasts of the Saints. On Oct 15, we celebrate the memory of the holy Hieromartyr Lucian, Presbyter of Antioch (+312). He was tortured for 9 years in Syria, no doubt in some of the same ways people are being tortured today in that besieged part of the world. He did something remarkable in prison. He became a living Antimension. We explain what an Antimension
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :Feasts of the Saints. On Oct 15, we celebrate the memory of the holy Hieromartyr Lucian, Presbyter of Antioch (+312). He was tortured for 9 years in Syria, no doubt in some of the same ways people are being tortured today in that besieged part of the world. He did something remarkable in prison. He became a living Antimension. We explain what an Antimension
